rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Gov't Code §2306.1101, which defines "homeless youth" for property designated for camping by homeless individuals. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 2306.1101. DEFINITION. In this subchapter, "homeless youth" means a person who is younger than 19 years of age
_note: Rule text pertains to homeless youth definitions; no bearing on homestead exemption amounts.
